'''''Cutlass''''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]]. It was destroyed while stationed in the [[System Patrol Squadron]] above [[Farfeld II]] by a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] attack force consisting of three [[A/SF-01 B-wing starfighter/Legends|B-wing starfighters]], one of them [[Pilot/Legends|piloted]] by [[Keyan Farlander/Legends|Keyan Farlander]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Tour of Duty: B-Wing]]'' {{1st}}
